text:
<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions-legacy/>
<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions-nox11-legacy/>
<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod-legacy/>
<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/virtualbox-ose-legacy/>
<https://www.freshports.org/emulators/virtualbox-ose-nox11-legacy/>
<https://www.freshports.org/www/phpvirtualbox-legacy/>

Deprecate the above. 

Focus, instead, on porting 7.x (bug 271146). 

5.1.38 is more than five years old, support for Oracle VM VirtualBox 5.x ended more than three years ago. 

Given <https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/cpujul2023.html#AppendixOVIR> excluding 5.x, and the numerous other exclusive advisories that have been published since around July 2020, it's reasonable to assume that various non-disclosed vulnerabilities exist.
